sql.trim: t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CONTACTS, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH, t1.ENTRY_LEVEL, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.EFFECT, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.MEMBER, t1.PERFORMANCE_SITUATION, t1.UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID, t1.VERSION, t1.MEMBER_ID, t1.COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CONTACT_INFORMATION, t1.ENTRY_NAME, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH, t1.END_DATE, t1.DATA_4,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_ANNOUNCE t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_ANNOUNCE
CREATED_BY,
CONTACTS,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH,
ENTRY_LEVEL,
CREATION_DATE,
EFFECT,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
MEMBER,
PERFORMANCE_SITUATION,
UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID,
VERSION,
MEMBER_ID,
COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CONTACT_INFORMATION,
ENTRY_NAME,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH,
END_DATE,
DATA_4,
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{collaborativePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{entryLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{effect,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{member,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{performanceSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{undertakePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{memberId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{collaborativePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contactInformation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{entryName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{undertakePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{endDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_ANNOUNCE( CREATED_BY , CONTACTS , LAST_UPDATED_BY , COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH , ENTRY_LEVEL , CREATION_DATE , EFFECT , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , MEMBER , PERFORMANCE_SITUATION , UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID , VERSION , MEMBER_ID , COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ORG_IDENTITY , CONTACT_INFORMATION , ENTRY_NAME , LAST_UPDATE_IP , UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH , END_DATE , DATA_4 )
select #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.collaborativePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.entryLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.effect,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.member,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.performanceSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.undertakePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.memberId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.collaborativePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contactInformation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.entryName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.undertakePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.endDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_ANNOUNCE
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CONTACTS = #{contacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH = #{collaborativePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ENTRY_LEVEL = #{entryLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
EFFECT = #{effect,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
MEMBER = #{member,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PERFORMANCE_SITUATION = #{performanceSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID = #{undertakePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
MEMBER_ID = #{memberId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID = #{collaborativePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CONTACT_INFORMATION = #{contactInformation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ENTRY_NAME = #{entryName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH = #{undertakePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_ANNOUNCE set CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTACTS = #{contacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH = #{collaborativePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ENTRY_LEVEL = #{entryLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , EFFECT = #{effect,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , MEMBER = #{member,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PERFORMANCE_SITUATION = #{performanceSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID = #{undertakePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , MEMBER_ID = #{memberId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID = #{collaborativePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTACT_INFORMATION = #{contactInformation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ENTRY_NAME = #{entryName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH = #{undertakePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_ANNOUNCE set CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTACTS = #{item.contacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH = #{item.collaborativePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ENTRY_LEVEL = #{item.entryLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , EFFECT = #{item.effect,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , MEMBER = #{item.member,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PERFORMANCE_SITUATION = #{item.performanceSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID = #{item.undertakePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , MEMBER_ID = #{item.memberId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , COLLABORATIVE_PARTY_BRANCH_ID = #{item.collaborativePartyBranchId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTACT_INFORMATION = #{item.contactInformation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ENTRY_NAME = #{item.entryName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNDERTAKE_PARTY_BRANCH = #{item.undertakePartyBranch,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , END_DATE = #{item.endDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DATA_4 = #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
